legalIdentity.naacHistoricalNote: Older governing/student-support documents state Accredited B++ by NAAC. AQAR 2022-2023 lists prior Cycle 1 Grade B, CGPA 2.85, valid 10/07/2014 to 09/07/2019. The site must not claim current NAAC accreditation until admin uploads current validity proof.
legalIdentity.complianceWarning: Do not edit statutory wording casually. Any approval, affiliation, NAAC, AICTE, GTU, VNSGU, or GNC statement must be tied to a document entry.
